CREATE TABLE nested_arrays (id UInt32, array_of_arrays Array(Array(UInt32)));
SELECT id, flatten(array_of_arrays) AS flattened_array FROM nested_arrays;
SELECT id, flatten(array_of_arrays) AS flattened_array FROM nested_arrays WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, flatten(array_of_arrays) AS flattened_array FROM nested_arrays WHERE size(flatten(array_of_arrays)) > 4;
SELECT id, flatten(array_of_arrays) AS flattened_array FROM nested_arrays WHERE flatten(array_of_arrays) <> [1, 2];
SELECT n.id, flatten(n.array_of_arrays) AS flattened_array FROM nested_arrays AS n JOIN another_table AS a ON n.id = a.val;
SELECT n.id, flatten(array_of_arrays) AS flattened_array FROM (SELECT id, array_of_arrays FROM nested_arrays WHERE id IN (1, 2)) AS n;
SELECT id, flatten(array_of_arrays) AS flattened_array FROM (SELECT array_of_arrays FROM nested_arrays WHERE id = 3) AS tmp;
SELECT id, flatten(array_of_arrays) AS flattened_array FROM nested_arrays GROUP BY id;
SELECT id, flatten(array_of_arrays) AS flattened_array FROM nested_arrays ORDER BY id DESC;
